description: The function merges two sorted shard id lists while preserving duplicates.
If the left id is less than or equal to the right id, the function appends the left id to the merged list.

conditions: merged and left_ids and right_ids and (merged[-1] == left_ids[-1] == right_ids[-1])
description: If the merged list, left_ids, and right_ids are not empty and the last elements of all three lists are equal, the function drops the duplicate element.
The function iterates through the left_ids and right_ids lists to merge them.
